form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (20.27) when sixth over 340m at Hobart in a Other. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed 10 times. Suited here and expected to run well.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 4 lengths over 340m at Hobart in a handy (19.26), beating Cabao Kyanite. Will find this a bit tougher, can't recommend against this lot.
